title: File permission restrictions - cannot upload file in form
excerpt:
Hi all, 
I have problem with uploading photos in my form. It says that it is restricted and no one can upload photos. How can I disable those restrictions so every user which want to fill up form could upload photo?

posts.author: MattPL (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I have problem with uploading photos in my form. It says that it is restricted and no one can upload photos. How can I disable those restrictions so every user which want to fill up form could upload photo?

image1084×405 69.5 KB

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MattPL

It looks as though the column is locked by the board owner - your first port of call is best to be made internally - see if you can speak with the admin of your account to discuss unlocking it; there may be a reason it’s in place

posts.author: MattPL (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml: I think that problem with my case is different. I noticed that when i duplicate Form, the new duplicated one allows me to use Upload Files field in form.
